name: AppHarvest, Inc.
description: AppHarvest, Inc. is an applied agricultural technology company that develops and operates high-tech indoor farms in Central Appalachia. The company builds large-scale controlled environment agriculture facilities designed to grow non-GMO, chemical-free produce using recycled rainwater and advanced robotics. AppHarvest aims to improve food security, promote sustainable farming practices, and create a resilient domestic food supply chain.
